assertions.title: Audit history dashboard displays all audits

steps.expected: History page loads with all audits listed
steps.observed: History page loaded showing '22 Total Audits' and '22 Shown' with header 'View and manage past audits'

steps.expected: Each audit has a status badge (completed/running/failed)
steps.observed: All audits display status badges - COMPLETED (green) for 20 audits, RUNNING (yellow/orange) for 2 audits, visually distinct colors

steps.expected: Trust scores displayed for each audit
steps.observed: Trust scores shown for all completed audits (e.g., 100, 26, 39, 22, 87, 75, 46, 12, 81, 12.5, 20.5). Running audits show '--'

steps.expected: Target URLs displayed for each audit
steps.observed: URLs shown: booking.com, example.com, nonexistent-domain-test, demo.ethicalsiteinspector.local, www.example.com
All entries show 'Created' timestamps (e.g., 'Mar 13, 2026, 5:21 AM', 'Mar 12, 2026, 6:39 AM')
RUNNING badge in yellow/orange is visually distinct from green COMPLETED badge. Trust score shows '--' for running audits
Tab switched to 'Completed' (selected state), list updated to show '20 Shown' out of '22 Total Audits'. No running audits visible. No page reload.
Tab switched to 'Running' (selected state), list updated to show '2 Shown' out of '22 Total Audits'. Only RUNNING status audits visible. No page reload.

steps.expected: Only audits with 'example' in URL shown
steps.observed: List filtered to '6 Shown' - only entries with example.com or www.example.com URLs displayed. Filtering happened in real-time without page reload.

evidence.network: Client-side filtering - no additional network requests needed

steps.action: From history page, scroll to booking.com audit (adcde59c) and click it

steps.observed: Trust Audit Report displayed with Trust Score 26/100, Critical Risk, 3 findings, target URL www.booking.com, personas (Privacy Sensitive, Cost Sensitive, Exit Intent), action buttons (Open HTML report, Download PDF, Compare Personas, Back to run log, Back to History)

steps.action: From report page, click 'History' nav link
From history page, click 'Home' nav link
steps.observed: Successfully navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/ - Home/SubmitPage displayed with 'Launch an audit' form

steps.action: From report page, click 'Back to run log' link
From report page, click 'Compare Personas' link

steps.expected: Home and History links visible on all pages
steps.observed: Navigation bar with 'Home' and 'History' links present on all visited pages (home, history, report, run, diff)

evidence.network: All navigations successful, pages loaded correctly

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-UI-001: History page displays 22 audits with status badges (completed/running), trust scores, URLs, and timestamps. VAL-UI-002: Status filtering (Completed shows 20, Running shows 2) and URL search ('example' shows 6) work without page reload. VAL-UI-003: Clicking booking.com audit navigates to /audits/{id}/report. VAL-UI-010: All pages (home, history, report, run, diff) reachable via persistent navigation links.
